DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT BARCLAYS CAPITAL REAL ESTATE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Tyler Macmillan, Staff Attorney, Eviction Defense Collaborative, (415) 947-0797 x 123, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Rachel S. Vaughan, Esq. of Houser & Allison (949) 679-1111, appearing for Defendant Barclays Capital Real Estate, Inc. and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the second cause of action. Plaintiff fails to adequately apprise defendants of the claims alleged. Demurrer overruled as to the first, third, and fifth causes of action, and moot as to the 7th cause of action. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
